text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Oguri Cap and Mejiro Ryan
heading somewhere in their tracksuits.
choice_data_list: Are you going to train together?
Are you going to train together?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: We're actually going to sow some tomato seeds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's to help the director. I was originally planning
on doing it alone, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oguri insisted it's too big a job for one person
and offered to help!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I've sown seeds before in my hometown.
choice_data_list: Do you want me to lend a hand too?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Would you really? That'd be a big help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's just like they say—when three's the pair,
there's no weighted barbell you can't bear.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wow... I've never heard that saying before.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's start by plowing the field.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: There are some weeds around here, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We'd better pull them first if we want the plants
to grow up strong.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Working crouched down is going to take some
endurance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Crouching... That's basically a squat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is gonna be great for my hamstrings!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I think you're onto something there. Ham would
go really well with tomatoes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You bet! Nothing beats tomatoes when it comes
to soothing sore and tired muscles!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Let's get this done so we can enjoy our
ham and tomatoes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's so much to do, though. Trainer, where
should we start?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's start with the weeds. Then Ryan, can
you till the soil?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: On it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I go around pulling every weed we
see.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whew, my knees are trembling... This is more
demanding than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's just your muscles crying out with joy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Muscles... have voices?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. I've never heard them speak to me
before, though...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Move around while crouching like that, and your
muscles will start to sing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's sowing time! Make sure you keep an
ear out for their cries of rapture!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wonder what kind of voices they have...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue sowing tomato seeds, listening to the
pair somehow go back and forth on two different
pages.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'm going to till the soil. I'll leave the weeds
to you, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You mean the squats, right? Say no more!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Uh, well... I actually meant pulling the weeds...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Was I unclear?
choice_data_list: I think you got the message across.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You think so? Well, I guess I'll just worry about
my own job.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After that, Oguri Cap and I plow the soil.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whew, this is pretty grueling... I don't think my
arms can take it any longer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That's proof your muscles are growing. Nice job,
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's the same over here. My hamstrings are
pumping way more than normal!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? I don't really get it, but I guess you must
really like ham and tomato.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm a big fan too, so I can see why you're excited.
I can't wait for the harvest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue sowing tomato seeds, listening to the
pair somehow go back and forth on two different
pages.
